summary: Frontend-only mobile and brand QA completed for public auth flows. Verified /auth and /auth/reset-password at 320/375/430 widths with no horizontal overflow. Protected routes redirected to /auth (no credentials available), so authenticated-page header/tab UX could not be fully validated.

ui_bugs.issue: Intermittent blank screen observed during first run; console shows hydration mismatch and repeated aborted module requests.
Multiple interactive elements on /auth are missing data-testid attributes, reducing UI test reliability and violating testability guideline.

integration_issues.issue: All tested protected routes redirect to /auth without authenticated session; could not validate shared app bars, large titles, and bottom tabs behavior in real protected context.

action_items: Investigate hydration mismatch on /auth (SSR/client markup mismatch around StarfieldHeroLayout) to remove intermittent blank first paint.
Stabilize dev/runtime module loading errors (net::ERR_ABORTED bursts) that coincide with blank render episodes.
Add data-testid attributes to /auth key controls (tab buttons, email input, password input, submit, Google CTA, forgot-password trigger).
Provide test credentials and re-run authenticated mobile checks for headers, large titles, tab bar tap targets, and content obstruction checks.
critical_code_review_comments: Auth route uses dynamic animated layout with SSR enabled at app level while this route is marked ssr:false; hydration mismatch traces suggest inconsistent server/client trees during route transitions.
Required test credential source is missing: /app/memory/test_credentials.md not found in workspace, blocking authenticated UI validation scope.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public route mobile checks passed for overflow and basic interactions on /auth and /auth/reset-password. First run produced blank auth screenshots caused by intermittent hydration mismatch + aborted module requests; second run rendered correctly. Authenticated routes were not testable due redirect-to-auth and missing credentials file.
rca of the issue: Reproduction: open /auth on mobile viewport during cold/dev load -> occasional blank cream screen with no visible form. Console in same run shows 'Hydration failed because the server rendered HTML didn't match the client' with stack pointing to /src/components/aegis/starfield-hero.tsx and multiple net::ERR_ABORTED module requests. Likely mitigation: align SSR/client rendering behavior for auth shell, avoid nondeterministic first render branches, and reduce early-load abort/reload churn.
